# Vendored `@emvault/jade`

This directory is a **verbatim copy** of `emvault-jade/src/` (the `@emvault/jade`
browser driver), vendored until the package is published to npm.

- Source repo: `emvault-jade` (github.com/gmikeska/emvault-jade)
- Source commit: `bf71e70`
- Files: `index.js`, `jade-rpc.js`, `cbor.js`

**Do not edit here.** Change the source repo, then re-run `scripts/check-vendor.sh`
(or re-copy) to refresh. Drift is caught by that script.
